title: Scientists Are Reprogramming Bacteria to Find Tumors, Move In, and Detonate
description: Genetically engineered gut bacteria are being turned into self-navigating tumor colonizers — living drug factories that exploit the hostile chemistry of cancer to target it from the inside. The science is further along than you think, and more complicated than the headlines will tell you. Here's what the evidence actually shows.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Scientists Are Reprogramming Bacteria to Find Tumors, Move In, and Detonate
